message:
feat(core): enhance PCA and fix reverse-frame diff alignment

Analysis module improvements:
- anomaly.ts: Add explicit WASM init call for wasm-compute module
  initialization. The wasm-pack bundler target may require calling
  the default export as an async init function before using exports.
  This fixes potential "wasm not initialized" errors on first use.

PCA enhancements (pca.ts):
- Add genomic signature PCA for k-mer frequency analysis
- Implement phase portrait analysis for genome dynamics
- Add bias decomposition analysis (AT-skew, GC-skew, purine-pyrimidine)
- Support both Float32Array and number[] inputs for flexibility
- Add comprehensive JSDoc documentation for all public functions
- Expand test coverage for edge cases and numerical stability

Virtualizer reverse-frame diff fix (virtualizer.ts):
- Fix amino acid alignment for reverse reading frames (-1, -2, -3)
- Previously, reverse frames used incorrect offset calculation that
  assumed forward-frame logic, causing diff highlighting misalignment
- Now properly reverse-complements the reference, translates with
  correct offset, and mirrors the result for accurate comparison
- Add totalLength parameter to support chunk-based diff computation
- Fix aaAlignStart calculation for both forward and reverse frames

Test updates:
- pca.test.ts: Add tests for new PCA variants and edge cases
- virtualizer-fix.test.ts: Add regression tests for reverse-frame diffs

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
